scripts.build: git checkout index.html; tmp=$(mktemp -d); if [ -d public/api ]; then mv public/api "$tmp/api"; fi; rm -rf public/assets; vite build; status=$?; if [ -d "$tmp/api" ]; then mv "$tmp/api" public/api; fi; rm -rf "$tmp"; rm -rf dist/api; if [ $status -ne 0 ]; then exit $status; fi; npm run sync-public
scripts.sync-public: cp dist/index.html public/ && rm -rf public/assets && cp -r dist/assets public/ && cp public/index.html index.html && rm -rf assets && cp -r public/assets .
